prompt: Tenho 3 papers sobre hepatorenal syndrome (CONFIRM trial PMID 34233093, ATTIRE trial PMID 34388394, e o guideline EASL 2023). Quero: 1) Criar notebook 'HRS Concurso' e ingerir os 3 papers 2) Gerar quiz com 10 questoes difficulty hard focado em criterios diagnosticos e manejo 3) Gerar flashcards difficulty medium sobre os numeros-chave dos trials 4) Gerar podcast formato deep_dive para ouvir na corrida 5) Baixar o podcast como mp3. Usar MCP tools se disponiveis, senao CLI.

assertions.text: Creates notebook with descriptive medical title (not generic 'Untitled')
Adds all 3 sources using PubMed URLs (https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/{PMID}/) or DOIs — not hallucinated URLs
Generates quiz with --count 10 --difficulty 3 AND --focus containing clinical terminology (diagnostic criteria, management, etc.)
Generates flashcards with --difficulty medium AND --focus mentioning trial endpoints or numbers
Sets an alias early and uses it throughout (avoids repeating UUID)
Downloads audio to .mp3 file with meaningful filename
Captures IDs from each creation step for use in subsequent steps (e.g., studio status before download)
